title: Metal Polish Compound Stick Clean Buff Metal Items Remove Oxidation (4 Types)
description:
Polish all of your metal items with the Universal Metal Polishing Compounds! These polishing compound sticks are a great addition to any household or workshop. Each container comes with a solid stick of polishing compound - #5 and #6 are 3.2oz each, #1 and #4 are 2.2oz each. The #6 compound is a high gloss polish, suitable for all metals including hard, soft and precious. It will create a high gloss finish - just attach it to your buffing wheel and watch your metals become super glossy! The #5 compound is a light gloss polish, and also is suitable for all metals. It will easily remove oxidation and give your metal items a light gloss sheen. The #4 compound is designed for use with precious metals only. It is ideal for regular cleaning, and will remove burs, corrosion and scratches

Metal Polish Compound Stick Clean Buff Metal Items Remove Oxidation (4 Types)

Polish all of your metal items with the Universal Metal Polishing Compounds!

These polishing compound sticks are a great addition to any household or workshop. Each container comes with a solid stick of polishing compound - #5 and #6 are 3.2oz each, #1 and #4 are 2.2oz each.

Key Features

  • #6 Compound: High Gloss Polish | 3.2 oz | All Metals
  • #5 Compound: Light Gloss Polish | 3.2 | All Metals
  • #4 Compound: Precious Metal Polish | 2.2 oz | Precious Metals Only
  • #1 Compound: Hard Metal Polish | 2.2 oz | Hard Metals Only
  • Ideal for Regular Use

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 768537915340
  • UPC: 723749177498
  • Color: Metal Polish

The #6 compound is a high gloss polish, suitable for all metals including hard, soft and precious. It will create a high gloss finish - just attach it to your buffing wheel and watch your metals become super glossy!

The #5 compound is a light gloss polish, and also is suitable for all metals. It will easily remove oxidation and give your metal items a light gloss sheen.

The #4 compound is designed for use with precious metals only. It is ideal for regular cleaning, and will remove burs, corrosion and scratches.

The #1 compound is designed for use with hard metals only. It is also ideal for regular cleaning, and will also remove burs, corrosion and scratches!

Make sure to grab one of these compound sticks depending on which kind of metals you need polished!

Please note: this listing is for (1) polishing compound of your choice, not all 4.
